title: clinanthus variegatus
intro: Clinanthus variegatus, also known as the variegated clinanthus or the striped tube-tongue, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It is a perennial plant with a history of medicinal use, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Clinanthus variegatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Clinanthus variegatus often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by infusing the plant's leaves, stems, and flowers in hot water or a solvent to extract its medicinal properties.
